Credits
Sentiment VADER (MIT) Emotion groups GoEmotions mappings (Apache-2.0) Advanced emotions SamLowe roberta GoEmotions ONNX (MIT) AI phrases llm-slop-detector (MIT) AI vocabulary additions GPTZero list via Schmalz & Tack, BEA 2025 (CC-BY 4.0, modified: 27-item subset) Leakage slopless (MIT) Transitions Discovery markers (Apache-2.0) CTA phrase lexicon curated from OOPSpam/uniform + ad corpus (MIT), SpamAssassin (Apache-2.0, modified), Untroubled archive, widget-caption (CC-BY 4.0, modified); imperative: compromise (MIT) Engagement bait bait-lexicon, curated in-house (original work) Rhythm & Flow Goh-Barabasi / Kim-Jo burstiness Word frequencies SUBTLEX-US (ISC, modified: top-25k trim) Emoji lean curated in-house Emoticons NLTK TweetTokenizer regex (Christopher Potts, Apache-2.0) + kaomoji from Wikipedia List of emoticons via emot (CC BY-SA) Emoji / symbol split Unicode Emoji_Presentation property Headline Upworthy Research Archive evidence (CC BY 4.0) Platform marks simple-icons (CC0) Readability Flesch-Kincaid + Coleman-Liau + ARI Segmentation CLDR cldr-segmentation + utfstring (MIT) Skim view eye-tracking evidence: Duggan & Payne 2011, Rayner 1998, Lorch 1986; validated on Provo, MECO, OneStop, EMTeC (all CC-BY) Style pack grammar engine: compromise (MIT, Spencer Kelly) · weakener lists: hedges + weasels (MIT, Titus Wormer), curated Contractions pair list cross-checked against stdlib nlp-expand-contractions (Apache-2.0) Platform folds see-more limits: AuthoredUp measurements Simplify retext-simplify (MIT) + Moby Thesaurus (public domain) + Norvig web counts; Advanced: ModernBERT (Apache-2.0) Read aloud Web Speech API + Kokoro-82M (Apache-2.0) Clean rules humanize-ai-lib (MIT) Markdown strip remove-markdown (MIT) URL cleanup tidy-url (MIT, global rule only) Spacing fixes typopo (MIT)
TellTale
Read aloud
Names the emotion in every sentence, 27 categories, context-aware. One-time 125 MB download.
Context-aware suggestions using a language model: catches complex words not in the list and checks each fits the sentence. One-time 151 MB download.

AI Typo
How AI Tells Work

TellTale reads your draft against a curated library of AI writing habits and marks what sounds like a machine, so the words that stay sound like you.
